$comment: Allowed (pre-existing) WCAG 2.1 AA violations per audited surface.
The a11y guard (e2e/a11y.spec.ts) compares the live axe results to
this baseline. A surface fails if:
- axe reports a rule that is NOT listed in the surface's baseline, OR
- axe reports MORE nodes for a baselined rule than the count here.
Fewer nodes = improvement, no failure (developers should drop the
count or remove the entry when the underlying issue is fixed).
Captured: 2026-04-21 against the post-task-#103 codebase. See
audit/PHASE_0_SECTION_G.md for surface→token mapping and the open
follow-up tasks tracking each remaining violation.
- 26 svg-img-alt: added aria-hidden=true to all decorative react-icons SVGs
- 1 select-name: linked Monthly Ad Spend select via htmlFor/id
